name: Original German Sweet Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Baker's German's sweet chocolate (4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in water and cool.
2. Cream butter and sugar together.
3. Beat in egg yolks, vanilla, and melted chocolate.
4. Mix flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Alternate beating in the flour mixture with buttermilk.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; fold into batter.
7. Pour batter into three 9-inch layer pans lined on bottoms with wax paper.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until cake springs back when lightly pressed in center.
9. Cool for 15 minutes, then remove and cool on a rack.
10. Frost the cake.
